/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/array.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/cloth.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/event.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/heap.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/htlc.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/list.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/network.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/payments.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/routing.c.o CMakeFiles/CLoTH_Gossip.dir/src/utils.c.o -o CLoTH_Gossip  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgsl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gsl/2.8/lib/libgslcblas.dylib -lm
